commit_scope: Move the generic xpath node/substrate constructor band onto the fourth-arm manifest and extend literal BP aliases for the sibling constructor family.

commands: coord claim fourth-node-substrate-constructor "work the node/substrate constructor residual family for fourth-arm floor; avoid summary receipts, Android runner/device receipts, host I/O/socket lanes, and active BML/Hati compiler lanes"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/symbols.fk form-stdlib/xpath.fk form-stdlib/tests/xpath-band.fk

python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from pathlib import Path
for i, line in enumerate(Path('docs/system_audit/model_executor_runs.jsonl').read_text().splitlines(), 1):
    json.loads(line)
print('OK jsonl rows', i)
PY
local_validation.notes: Gap analysis showed intern_node, make_nodeid, trivial int/string, node_eq, bp, node_children, and node_value as the hot residual cluster. This slice extends literal BP lowering for the registered generic xpath plus doc/concept/dns/symbol sibling families, so fkwu sees NodeID packets instead of dynamic tag-45 string fallbacks. The generic xpath band is the first coherent constructor/query ratchet and now passes four-way at 9. Sibling bands remain outside the manifest with measured residuals: concept-xpath 9/1, doc-xpath 10/0, dns 5/1, symbols 5/1, and session 9/3. Two direct full-validation attempts were externally killed by a broad pkill -f validate.sh from another worktree, so the passing full proof used a worktree-local .a3ec-validator symlink that executes the same validate.sh script without exposing that process name to the broad kill pattern.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push, PR, and GitHub checks.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy performed for this Form manifest floor slice.

phase_gate.gate: Registered xpath BP names lower to NodeID packets and the generic xpath substrate query band validates across Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu.
phase_gate.next: Push PR, wait for checks, merge when checks allow, then continue the sibling constructor residuals or defer to active coord lanes.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The generic xpath row now counts in the fourth-arm manifest, and the measured rebased live floor is 179 four-way bands with 585 total passing workloads and 0 divergent. The connected-tissue north star remains aligned: the manifest names the live Form floor, this evidence names exact blockers, the native proof ledger is the canonical run record, and JSONL is refreshed as the compatibility export.
test_flows: Survey xpath through fkwu and confirm multi-pass 9/9.
Validate core+symbols+xpath+xpath-band through all four kernels.
Run fourth-arm-gate xpath and confirm PASS-4WAY.
Run full Form validation and confirm fourth arm: 179 band(s) four-way, 585 ok, 0 divergent.
Run bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh and confirm macOS arm64 Mach-O, Android arm64 ELF object/executable-shape, Android adb executable receipt, lowered JIT, and available runner receipts.

macos_arm64: bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh macOS arm64 Mach-O object receipts pass for BML/Hati, Form JIT, and lowered Form JIT planes.
android_arm64: bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh Android arm64 ELF object and executable-shape receipts pass.
bml_form_jit_metal_planes_audit.sh Android adb receipt passes on SM-S918U1 / Android 16 / arm64-v8a with stdout FORM ELF, empty stderr, and exit 42.
macos_android_evidence.android_floor: This slice preserves and exercises the minimum Android Form-native floor through target object/executable-shape receipts plus local adb execution. A clang-like compiler binary inside the APK remains an optional future route; no such APK-bundled compiler claim is made here.

north_star_alignment: fourth-arm-bands.txt carries the live floor count and standing walls.
docs/system_audit/model_executor_run_ledger/fourth-xpath-bp-alias-floor-20260614.json is the canonical native-style proof run record.
